markdownRemark.html:
CORRECTION:

THERE WILL ONLY BE 1 JAMĀʿAH.

The ʿĪd Prayer will be held on Friday, Oct. 12th, at Foster Farm Gymnasium, 1065 Ramsey

TAKBEER AT 8:30AM PRAYER AT 9:00AM SHARP

We apologize for the earlier mistake.

as-salaamu ‘alaikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh

We are pleased to inform you that ʿĪd al-fiṭr is tomorrow, Friday, Oct. 12th, 2007

The ʿĪd Prayer will be held at Foster Farm Gymnasium, 1065 Ramsey @ 9:00 am sharp

Please bring your own rugs, blankets, etc.
